title: Kane Pixels Backrooms Texturepack (LEVEL 188 UPDATE)
description:
The best Backrooms Kane Pixels Complex texturepack out there.
THANKS FOR 100 DOWNLOADS
body:
# REALISTIC KANE PIXELS TEXUREPACK

## With each gallery pic, I show a progress report on an accurate kane pixels map im working on that will be compaitable with the texturepack.


### (THANKS FOR 100 DOWNLOADS)

This is a realistic Backrooms texturepack based on
the Kane Pixels series. Expect updates regularly.

_Feel free to leave suggestions; I check DMs on a regular
basis._

**Curseforge page: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/backrooms-kane-pixels-512**

Discord: @cyberhugh13371

## Pictures !WIP!



![Room 14C.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72fa203b3538eee44e6f9016f5d069c0f3796a78_0.webp)


## Updates

- Retextured dark oak planks as Lvl 188 standard floor

## What to Expect

1. Found Footage 2 Blocks
2. Async Blocks
3. Door Revamp


## BLOCKS

- Yellow Concrete: Wallpaper
- Orange Terracotta: Tiny Wallpaper
- Yellow Concrete Powder: Floor
- Stripped Birch log/wood - Backrooms Ceiling Tile
- Ochre Froglight - Fluorescent Light
- Sea Lantern - Flourescent Light
- Verdant Froglight - Green Light
- Polished Diorite - Regular Ceiling Tile
- Smooth Sandstone - Chevron Wallpaper
- Bamboo Planks - Yellow Chevron Wallpaper
- Dark Prismarine - Poolroom Tile
- Dark Oak Planks - Dark Wooden Floor
